The HookEscrowObligation calls these during the escrow lifecycle.      `data` is opaque, hook-specific configuration (e.g. token + amount).      Security model: hooks hold assets and track deposits per-caller      (msg.sender). No authorization mapping is needed \u2014 the caller's      deposit balance is the implicit permission to params.escrow: The escrow obligation contract that initiated the lock.

params.data: The same hook data that was passed to onLock.
params.escrow: The escrow obligation contract that initiated the release.

params.data: The same hook data that was passed to onLock.
params.escrow: The escrow obligation contract that initiated the return.
params.to: The address to return assets to (original creator).

onLock(bytes,address,address).notice: Lock assets into escrow on behalf of `from`.

onRelease(bytes,address,address).notice: Release escrowed assets to the fulfiller.

onReturn(bytes,address,address).notice: Return escrowed assets to the original owner on expiry.
